sections.paragraph:
Original: תּשׁוּקה

Transliteration: teshûqâh

Phonetic: tesh-oo-kaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. desire, longing, craving
    1. of man for woman
    2. of woman for man
    3. of beast to devour

Origin: from H7783 in the original sense of stretching out after

TWOT entry: 2352a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
